_comment: Item 8b STORY fixture — synthetic, PII-free (no emails; @example only if any). Arbitrary CV-ish JSON the STRICT master-CV parser rejects (no schemaVersion), forcing the adaptive miner. It mines to a CV that HAS a person name + skills but NO work experience — so the missing-field flow triggers on the experience + achievement IMPORTANT classes. The --use-fakes path must then produce a watermarked cv.SAMPLE.pdf, and a normal export must be refused.
